response: the sacred hymn siriragau mahala 3 speaks of the spirit of devotion and the power of the word - the language of the divine - that guides the soul to enlightenment - the gene of spiritual awakening is passed through the grace of the guru - visit the path of truth and find peace within - the soul is cleansed when it merges with the divine - the true master reveals the sacred word - the seeker must follow the path of the guru - without the guru's guidance, devotion cannot be achieved - the self must be united with the divine - the soul becomes pure through this union - the holy name is the key to salvation - the true master is the light that illuminates the darkness - the path of devotion leads to eternal bliss - the spirit is awakened through the grace of the guru - the language of the divine is the sacred word - the gene of spiritual knowledge is passed on through the guru - the seeker must visit the path of truth - the soul finds peace in the divine - the spirit is united with the divine - the language of the sacred word is the path to salvation - the gene of spiritual awakening is the gift of the guru - the visit to the path of truth brings eternal peace - the soul is united with the divine through the sacred word - the spirit is cleansed and enlightened through devotion - the language of the divine is the path to salvation - the gene of spiritual knowledge is the gift of the guru - the seeker must visit the path of truth - the soul finds peace in the divine - the spirit is united with the divine through the sacred word - the language of the divine is the path to salvation - the gene of spiritual awakening is the gift of the guru - the visit to the path of truth brings eternal peace - the soul is united with the divine through the sacred word - the spirit is cleansed and enlightened through devotion - the language of the divine is the path to salvation - the gene of spiritual knowledge is the gift of the guru - the seeker must visit the path of truth - the soul finds peace in the divine - the spirit is united with the divine through the sacred word - the language of the divine is the path to salvation - the gene of spiritual awakening is the gift of the guru - the visit to the path of truth brings eternal peace - the soul is united with the divine through the sacred word - the spirit is cleansed and enlightened through devotion - the language of the divine is the path to salvation - the gene of spiritual knowledge is the gift of the guru - the seeker must visit the path of truth
